prompt: Create a collage featuring a vintage dress from image 1, a futuristic bodysuit from image 2, and handwritten fashion notes from image 3.
prompt_refined: Generate a collage. Prominently feature the sleek, dark futuristic bodysuit with glowing geometric patterns from image 2. Artfully integrate a vintage dress, embodying the elegant, early 20th-century style and flowing silhouette seen in image 1, placed alongside or partially overlapping the bodysuit. Overlay the detailed handwritten fashion sketches and textual notes from image 3 as a transparent background texture or border, creating a harmonious yet contrasting visual composition.
objects: sleek, dark futuristic bodysuit with glowing geometric patterns
vintage dress embodying elegant, early 20th-century style and flowing silhouette
detailed handwritten fashion sketches (as a transparent background texture or border)
textual notes (from fashion sketches, as a transparent background texture or border)
